hero.title: Premium Electronics for Modern Living
hero.subtitle: Smart devices, trusted choices
hero.description: Discover laptops, smartphones, audio devices, wearables and accessories selected for everyday performance, comfort and value.

about.title: About TechCart
about.description: TechCart helps customers explore reliable electronics, compare useful product details and build a cart with a simple, smooth shopping experience. Our showcase focuses on quality gadgets, clear pricing, responsive browsing and customer-friendly product discovery.
highlights: Curated electronics for work, study and entertainment
Clear product details with pricing and category filtering
Guest browsing with optional account login
Simple cart experience designed for fast checkout decisions

footer.description: TechCart is a customer-focused electronics showcase for discovering smart devices, accessories and everyday tech essentials with a clean and responsive shopping experience.
